{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220253191165B823A5B1C454EBF7"}"},"total":1240},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7243997598323114790","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是比较中规中矩的穿越文，没有特别创新的地方，但是整体故事情节紧凑，人物刻画细腻，尤其是女主的身世在前期一直扑朔迷离，让人有继续读下去的欲望。这篇文里的男女主都不是那种特别强大，无所不能的，比较接地气，整个文读起来比较舒服。我也算是个老书虫了，很多书套路都一样，读着读着就没劲了，凡是能让我一口气读完的书，在我这里都是五星好评。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686624770,"group_id":"7147582965583711247","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxhSNAcDdoCwM/M07bOitl4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"86203505752","user_name":"大明湖畔爱古言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"86203505752","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743223315,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7147582965583711247","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越+无限空间+赚钱+友情爱情+甜宠+双洁
豪门富家女带着自己满别墅的物资，穿越成两袖清风的官家娇弱嫡女，看似娇弱，实际上是半点亏都不会吃的白切黑。
卖现代化妆品，开美容院、美甲店、商场，赚钱美滋滋。
什么？侍郎夫人想给她下马威？弄她！
外朝使臣和带来的小妖精想占便宜？弄他！
某大人不长眼的亲戚来捣乱，必须弄他！
闺蜜撸起袖子就要干仗？快拦住她，咱们做生意的，能智取就莫要动粗，不淑女。
智取不了？那还等什么，关门，放打手，往死里揍！
想耽误本大小姐赚银子，简直不要命了。
男人？什么男人？不需要！
丫鬟：姑娘，将军送了两箱金子赔礼！
眼冒金星：将军真是这世间最好的儿郎，嘻嘻嘻！
与闺蜜团在京城搅弄风云，并且寻找到属于各自的人生另一半。
原想冷眼旁观世间险恶，却不曾想，自己早已与恶魔有不共戴天之仇。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a7b4a020404e62699fbd1342e1ad20d7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"姜啊姜姜","author_id":"","book_id":"7147582965583711247","book_name":"家道中落？嫡女反手掏出十间旺铺","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5885人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":28,"name":"萌宝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=28&name=萌宝&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":88,"name":"嫡女","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=88&name=嫡女&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7147584043633410597","read_count":"5885","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1117913"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"540","tags":"种田,古代言情,萌宝,穿越,空间,嫡女,甜宠,病娇,今穿古,大小姐,双洁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1514ce92591e8093920312f516f8a570~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303200&x-signature=5jv1n9XoC0CQTCxHrllyqxC1S9Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1512528213452061","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.0605834e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220253191165B823A5B1C454EBF7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":50605,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":11159},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1686821952,"author_reply_time":1686821951,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7188211639719248680","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，推荐。
虽然也是一本套路爽文，但作者把女主刻画的很好。而且家里好朋友闺蜜等都没啥极品，姨娘也是特别好，总基调就很舒心小欢快，感情也没啥波折水到渠成，但是作者好像感情戏过敏，男主偶尔有点油腻。
女主特别好，也许有的人觉得爱多管闲事，但我觉得女主是个善良热爱生活上进又努力的人。不管是对朋友的援手，还是弟弟的雪中送炭，亦或者义无反顾的救灾，是内心温暖也能照亮别人的人。
把上辈子学到的，在另一个时空学以致用，特别棒。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673636365,"group_id":"7147582965583711247","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"妈妈平安喜乐 ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9FTHxJbraH3b2bgiRKFRrs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e2771587a16f40f59bcdb1f602784496~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709940&x-signature=OZkOvVtPmUSA9MUAvYyrXsK%2FHkE%3D","user_id":"25333301258","user_name":"盛阳天阳光正好"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"25333301258","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1660288818,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7147582965583711247","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越+无限空间+赚钱+友情爱情+甜宠+双洁
